channel.title: Urban Gardening Daily
channel.description: Fresh takes for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.

item.title: The state of Containers in 2026
item.description: A field report on containers: where things stand, and what apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Herbs without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to herbs for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "balcony garden ideas" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "balcony garden ideas" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why apartment dwellers are rethinking Composting
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners approach composting — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Seasonal on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in seasonal — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Herbs: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping herbs for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.
